calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ANGEL GULLEY'S Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions is denied. Defendant has not shown that she prevailed in the action, or that she did so within 60 days of its being filed. (CCP 1161.2) Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
ANGEL MARIE GULLEY, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)387-2110, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY

AS STATED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING, PROOF SERVICE BE PROVIDED AT THE HEARING. THE DEFENDANT PRESENTED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT ANGEL GULLEY'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. THERE WAS NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/PJB/ju) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
